_comment: Per-object token-normalization map for the golden-file byte-compare harness
(Stage B4). One entry per object type. For each zip member:
tokens           — run-scoped literals embedded in the golden vs the local
run. Both sides are rewritten to the same placeholder
before the byte compare: the golden value 'golden' and
the local value supplied on the compare_fbdi.py command
'placeholder'. 'match' restricts where a token may hit:
numeric ids cannot collide with unrelated business data.
token to the named CSV columns.
date_mask_fields — 0-based CSV field positions (per the object's CTL
column order) that carry generation-time dates
both sides ONLY when both sides match the FBDI date
pattern YYYY/MM/DD — a non-date difference there is
still reported as a real diff.
Nothing else is normalized. Any other difference is a finding.

GLBalances.golden_provenance: Old-stack run 100000740, prefix 9403, GROUP_ID 100000294 (old stack used a separate group-id sequence; rebuilt stack sets GROUP_ID = RUN_ID per ParameterList)
